description: Configure the Wazuh Manager in the 'wazuh.manager' container to correctly ingest multi-line Java stack traces from '/var/log/billing_app.log'. Enable global log archiving (logall) in 'ossec.conf' and configure a 'localfile' block for the log file using 'syslog' format. The configuration must include a 'multiline_regex' to merge lines belonging to the same event, identifying timestamps formatted as '2023-11-15 08:30:00'. The log file is already present.
